name: smart-slides
description: Create long-form smart-slides videos with Jogg talking-avatar opening and closing shots.

interface.longDescription: Orchestrates local Jogg and Podcastor Video Studio services to create a planned, storyboarded, B-roll-led video with Jogg avatar scenes.
defaultPrompt: Use smart-slides to create a 10 minute Chinese video with Jogg avatars only at the opening and closing.
Use smart-slides to check the status of my video run.
Use smart-slides to resume my incomplete video render.
